chunks.text: ORDER SHEET HIGH COURT OF SINDH CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD Cr. Bail Application No.S- 595 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE For hearing of MA 7093/2025. 20.10.2025. None present for applicant / surety. Miss Safa Hisbani, A.P.G for State. = Through this application, applicant seeks release of surety furnished in the present matter. It appears that that vide Order dated 30.05.2025 the applicant/accused was granted ad-interim pre-arrest bail by this Court and the required surety was duly submitted by the present applicant/surety. Thereafter, on 16.06.2025 the instant bail application was dismissed and the interim bail granted to the applicant/accused was recalled, as such surety furnished before this Court is no more required. Learned A.P.G after going through the record, tendered her no objection for release of surety. In view of above, listed application stands disposed of with direction to the office to release/return the surety to applicant/surety, however, after due verification and identification as per procedure. JUDGE Tufail
